chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1315 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 10-09-2025 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for the petitioner. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
